top_signals.title: The ECB is in a bind over rate hikes — the private sector could be doing the bank's job for it
top_signals.summary: Market expectations that the European Central Bank will hike interest rates this year have already contributed to tighter financial and lending conditions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Iran and the Forever War Trap
top_signals.summary: In trying to avoid a quagmire in Iran, America found a dead end.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Commission approves €500 million Spanish State aid for agricultural companies facing increased fertiliser prices
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 28 May 2026 The European Commission has approved a €500 million Spanish State aid scheme to support agricultural companies facing increased fertiliser prices due to the Middle East crisis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Zinus Secures Charging Tower Contract in Australia
top_signals.summary: Zinus has been awarded its first-ever contract in Australia by UGL Transport with the end customer being Transport for NSW for a charging tower installation at the iconic Barangaroo Wharf in Sydney.Under the contract, Zinus will deliver its fully autonomous DC Charging Tower, the ZPP800.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hackers exploit FortiClient EMS flaw to push infostealer malware
top_signals.summary: Hackers are exploiting an authentication bypass vulnerability (CVE-2026-35616) in FortiClient Enterprise Management Server (EMS) to deliver an undocumented credential stealer called EKZ. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to inch up as US-Iran peace deal ‘very close’
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. After investors kicked into sell-off mode on Thursday amidst spiking tensions as the US and Iran exchanged strikes, attention is quickly turning back to hopes of a peace deal this morning. US and Iranian negotiators are reported to have reached an agreement on a 60-day [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Treasuries Resume Decline as US Strikes Push Oil Prices Higher  Bloomberg.com

top_signals.title: Yiulian Dockyard Hong Kong Offers Digital Twin Piping Fabrication
top_signals.summary: Yiulian Dockyard Hong Kong is open for business following a major facility upgrade and workforce expansion, with on-site digital twin pipe fabrication adopted in cooperation with Irwin Limited.As the only dockyard in China that accepts vessels alongside laden…
